LightningComponentBundle.description: Multiclass classification: text prediction label from Flow, recommendations JSON only, optional Einstein summary.

property.name: cardTitle
property.label: Main card title
property.description: Heading at the top of the card.

property.name: summaryCardTitle
property.label: AI summary card title
property.description: Reserved for future use; summary block has no separate heading today.

property.name: flowApiName
property.label: Autolaunched flow API name
property.description: Flow must output text prediction and recommendations JSON (no factors).

property.name: recordIdInputName
property.label: Flow input variable for record Id

property.name: classSubtitle
property.label: Subtitle under predicted class
property.description: Caption below the label (e.g. Product line, Segment).

property.name: humanizeClassName
property.label: Humanize class label for display
property.description: When true, underscores become spaces and words are title-cased (Wealth_Management → Wealth Management). When false, show exact flow string.

property.name: promptTemplateId
property.label: Prompt template Id or API name
property.description: JSON payload includes prediction (string), predictionType multiclass_label, recommendations.

property.name: promptInputApiName
property.label: Prompt template text input API name

property.name: themeMode
property.label: Theme
property.description: default preserves the original light card. The other 42 values match profile-widget themes (obsidian through union). For FSI demos, pair dark themes with accentColor — see profile widget documentation.

property.name: showThemeSwitcher
property.label: Show theme switcher in header
property.description: When true, shows four quick theme buttons next to Refresh (obsidian, midnight, graphite, ivory). Keep false in production.

property.name: accentColor
property.label: Theme accent (optional)
property.description: Optional #hex accent; when blank, a bronze default is applied for accent-derived chrome.

property.name: warningColor
property.label: Theme warning override
property.description: Change from default only to override the semantic warning token applied with themes.

property.name: negativeColor
property.label: Theme negative / error tint
property.description: Change from default only to override error text tint (--wp-negative).

property.name: summaryAndLabelTextColor
property.label: Summary & label text color (optional)
property.description: Optional #hex or rgb()/rgba(). Applies to GenAI summary, section title, recommendation row labels, and legend text. Leave blank for theme default.

property.name: summaryTextSizePercent
property.label: GenAI summary text size (%)
property.description: Percentage of default summary font size (80–200). 100 = default. Section titles and labels are not scaled.

property.name: recordIdInputName
property.label: Flow input variable for record Id

property.name: promptTemplateId
property.label: Prompt template Id or API name

property.name: promptInputApiName
property.label: Prompt template text input API name

property.name: themeMode
property.label: Theme
property.description: default = original light card; 42 additional themes aligned with profile widgets.

property.name: flowApiName
property.label: Autolaunched flow API name
property.description: Required at runtime; set in App Builder.

property.name: recordIdInputName
property.label: Flow input variable for record Id

property.name: promptTemplateId
property.label: Prompt template Id or API name

property.name: promptInputApiName
property.label: Prompt template text input API name

property.name: themeMode
property.label: Theme
property.description: default = original light card; 42 additional themes aligned with profile widgets.
